title: 1) Systematic effect with qi modulation
text:
Internal organs and face
The practitioner can regulate energy ﬂow with various acupuncture techniques. Spleen-qi
deﬁciency makes the patient's face sallow. Too much ﬁre on the heart makes the whole face
red, and ﬁre with Yin deﬁciency makes the cheek bone area red. Patients with Kidney
deﬁciency have a dark or swollen face.
Meridian innervation
The Stomach Meridian covers the largest part of the face, so when a patient has digestive
problems, the negative responses are present on the face. The Large Intestine Meridian ﬂows
in the middle part around the nose and mouth. Therefore, a problem of in the skin area can
mean something like constipation or an irritable bowl. The Gall Bladder Meridian and the
Triple Burner Meridian pass by the side of face, so when the patient has acne around ear,
migraines, or a tightened temporalis headache, we need to consider those two Meridians.
Changes in speciﬁc parts of the skin such as pimples or eczema, change of complexion,
and swelling are all connected to the internal organs. For beautiful skin and complexion, we
should treat the qi energy of internal organs ﬁrst.
~ !  ~
41
Needling by systemic effect with qi modulation
Needling at LI-20, ST-3, and CV-24
• To regulate the channels
• To vitalize the skin around the acupoints
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
